_publications._publicationTitle: A platform for rapid patient-derived cutaneous neurofibroma organoid establishment and screening

_contextSnippet: NF0012 showed lower NF1 expression than any other patient, with the exclusion of NF0002; RNA-seq revealed reduced NF1 transcript levels consistent with detected germline variants
details: NF0012 showed the lowest NF1 expression of any patient in the cohort; harbors compound NF1 variants: 351 bp deletion, large chr17 inversion, and stop-gain in exon 12
